overview: Top notch Performance of Non-Invasive and Invasive Ventilation for all Patient Categories
features: LYRA x2 is a premium non-invasive turbine driven ventilator with no compromise on the performance in invasive ventilation.
User can easily switch between NIV- and IV-modes by UI operation only.Comprehensive parameter monitoring describes the full scenario of patient’s status to the care giver.
In a busy ICU it is imperative to give the desired mechanical ventilation to the patient.An 18.5 inch vertical layout touchscreen display makes operating of the ventilator smooth & easy.
